---
title: "Weeping Silver Lime (Tilia tomentosa)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Malvaceae](/trees/family/malvaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Tilia*](/trees/genus/tilia.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 20 - Weeping Silver Lime](../20.html) | SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard |
